steps.title: This protocol performs a custom 384-well PCR preparation
steps.instruction: This protocol performs a custom 384-well PCR preparation. The user has the option to enter the following parameters: * number of samples * volume of sample * number of mastermixes * volume of mastermix * number of replicates per sample + mastermix combination Mastermixes should be pre-mixed and loaded into individual tubes as shown below. For efficiency, the mastermixes will first be plated from their source tubes into distribution columns using a single channel pipette, before being loaded into the 384-well plate with an 8-channel pipette. For sample traceability, an output .csv file will be written to the robot's Jupyter notebook server for each protocol run. The user has the option to input a `run ID` to distinguish each run. To find these output files, please refer to [this support article](https://support.opentrons.com/s/article/Uploading-files-through-Jupyter-Notebook).

steps.title: Download your protocol and unzip if needed
steps.instruction: Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
